User.title: User Account
User.description: System-level user account defining credentials and authorization roles.

uid.description: Unique identifier matching Firebase Auth UID.

AwardeeProfile.title: Awardee Profile
AwardeeProfile.description: Comprehensive academic and professional registry for Bright Scholarship recipients.

awardeeId.description: Foreign key pointing to the awardee's User uid.

university.description: E.g., Universitas Indonesia, Universitas Mataram, etc.

bio.description: A short self-introductory summary or professional headline.

skills.description: Array of technology, leadership, or technical skills.

totalServiceHours.description: Aggregated cache of social work and community development hours.

status.description: Current status of the scholarship recipient.

Activity.title: Scholarship Activity
Activity.description: Event and program logs for leadership pembinaan and community engagement pengabdian.

activityId.description: Unique identifier for the activity log.

description.description: Detailed description of activities and impact.

mediaUrl.description: Photo documentation or reference folder link.

awardeesInvolved.description: List of awardee UIDs active or participating in this event.

hoursEarned.description: Number of social/service hours earned per awardee for participating.

location.description: Venue, village, or link if online.

createdBy.description: UID of the Admin who logged the activity.

ImpactStat.title: Impact Statistics
ImpactStat.description: Global cache for real-time dashboard data aggregations.

totalServiceHours.description: Total service and pengabdian hours logged across the scholarship.

pembinaanHours.description: Aggr. duration of leadership and capacity building seminars.

/users/{userId}.description: Registered system user account information mapping roles (Admin, Awardee, Public).

/awardees/{awardeeId}.description: Detailed biographical, academic, and professional profile of Bright Scholarship awardees.

/activities/{activityId}.description: Logbook database of events, pembinaan, and pengabdian masyarakat.

/impact_stats/{statId}.description: Aggregated cache for ultra-fast, cost-effective dashboard analytics rendering.
